CustomField.description: When non-null, external requester email notifications are active. Sends stage-change and SLA-breach emails to the ExternalRequesterEmailTxt__c address on work items. Requires EnableEmailNotificationsDateTime__c to also be set.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set to a date/time to enable external requester notifications. Leave blank to disable.
CustomField.label: Enable External Notifications
